page_metadata.biotools__summary: FANTEN (Finding Anisotropy TENsor) is a new user-friendly web tool for the determination of the anisotropy tensors related to PCSs (pseudo-contact shifts) and RDCs (residual dipolar couplings).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FANTEN (Finding Anisotropy TENsor) is a new user-friendly web tool for the determination of the anisotropy tensors related to PCSs (pseudo-contact shifts) and RDCs (residual dipolar couplings).
